title: Hector Campos
compiled_truth: Hector Campos is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-04 to 2001-10-12), Hector Campos sent 13 and received 276 emails, totalling 289 interactions. Top correspondents: [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (7), [Brian Hoskins](people/brian-hoskins) (6), [Lenine Jeganathan](people/lenine-jeganathan) (4), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (4), [Shanna Husser](people/shanna-husser) (2).
